title: MCP tool Signal notifications with per-group toggle
description: Add optional Signal message notifications when MCP tools are invoked, controlled by a per-group setting. When enabled for a group, tools send a brief Signal message confirming what they did. Add a new MCP tool to toggle this setting per group, and update the creating-mcp-tools skill to document the pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: New database table/column storing per-group 'tool notifications enabled' setting (default: off)
New MCP tool (toggle_tool_notifications or similar) that enables/disables tool notifications for a specific group
When enabled, MCP tools send a brief Signal message to the group after completing their action
Notification messages should be clearly distinguishable from regular bot responses (prefixed or formatted differently)
Tools that fail should also notify briefly
Notification mechanism available as a shared utility (not duplicated per server)
Update creating-mcp-tools skill to document notification integration
All existing MCP servers updated to use the notification mechanism
No notification for the toggle tool itself (avoid loops)
No notification for send_message/send_image signal tools (redundant)
